title: glottiphyllum neilii
intro: Glottiphyllum neilii, also known as Neil's living stone, is a species of succulent plant in the family Aizoaceae, characterized by its unique, stone-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Glottiphyllum neilii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Glottiphyllum neilii are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and dosages.
